title: aucuparia silvestris
intro: Aucuparia silvestris, also known as the Rowan or Mountain Ash tree, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia. The bark and berries of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aucuparia silvestris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the tree's bark and berries can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
